title: Minimal research-profile experiment block for schema validation

signal.digest: A minimal research-profile experiment block containing all required fields. Validates that the v0.2 schema correctly enforces topology (with negative_space and invariants), edges, path, and reproduce for research experiments.
signal.falsifies_if: The v0.2 schema validator rejects this block or fails to enforce any conditional requirement.

setup.content: Run a JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 validator against this fixture file using the v0.2 schema.

result.content: Validator returns valid with zero errors, confirming all conditional requirements are satisfied.

negative_space: Does not test optional fields or edge cases

negative_space.claim: Does not validate cross-node reference integrity

must_hold: All required fields for research+experiment profile are present

must_hold.claim: StatusClaim items accept both string and object forms

reproduce.protocol: Install ajv-cli or equivalent JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 validator. Run: ajv validate -s ompu_block_v0.2.json -d valid_research.json
